title: Miro.com Integration
excerpt: We are using Miro for visual collaboration. Does Monday have plans to integrate with Miro?

posts.author: Sabra (Sabra)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Miro for visual collaboration. Does Monday have plans to integrate with Miro?

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sabra!

Ivan here from the monday.com team! While we don’t currently offer a native integration with Miro, that definitely sounds like a really interesting piece of feedback that I’d like to pass along to the Autopilot Team for their review and consideration!

In the meantime, maybe you could try seeing if you’re able to create and external integration with Miro using Zapier.com or Integromat.com?

posts.author: Susan_Bolles (Susan Bolles)
posts.cookedHtml: Also interested in this. If you find an external integration for miro, would you report back?

posts.author: snicho (Stephen Nicholson)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1

We would also love to see this integration.

I previously flagged this with our partner manager.

And I have also asked the reverse question at Miro - if they can integrate with Monday

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to add a editable miro board to a monday view in a board, and being able to connect or link miro blocks to monday items would be awesome, I must say

posts.author: amohelsky (Alexander Mohelsky)
posts.cookedHtml: We are also going to be using Miro more and more for visual collaboration. Would be nice to see an integration like the one with Jira.

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: for those who do not know this is added to the beta app marketplace, i spotted it todat

posts.author: sschreiner (Sebastian Schreiner)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ivanhong-monday.com
While you’re looking at Miro please also look at Mural, the other big provider of virtual collaboration space, for integration opportunities.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sabra

You can use the Miro app in our apps marketplace!

Do note that this app was not developed by the monday.com team. As such, we don’t have any control over its functionality – and do not provide support for setting it up. Our team has reviewed it against our security and privacy guidelines, but we cannot fully certify it.

If you do want to try it out, I’d recommend checking out the app details in the marketplace here:

monday.com

monday.com: Apps Marketplace

monday.com apps marketplace, Expand the capabilities of your Work OS with monday apps

You can review the app’s documentation (and applicable privacy policies) and install it if you choose.

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
